title: ilex aquifolium f. pendula
intro: Ilex aquifolium f. pendula is a variety of the evergreen holly plant, characterized by its pendulous habit and attractive foliage. The leaves and berries of Ilex aquifolium f. pendula have been used in traditional medicine for their antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which can aid in reducing fever, relieving headaches, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Ilex aquifolium f. pendula include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to promote digestion, reduce stress, and improve cardiovascular health. Additionally, the plant's berries have been used to support eye health and reduce the risk of age-related macular degeneration.
